meaning: 马那瓜湖[尼加拉瓜西部]
examples: Nicaraguan-Americans put buyers in Miami in touch with sellers in Managua.
One of the oldest colonial towns in Central America, Granada is accessible by road from Managua.
Whole Child plans to supplement their pay and raise funds in Managua to continue doing so.
On January 18th, Pedro Solorzano woke up to find he was no longer in Managua.
